name.description: Product name. Do not translate Kode Injector.

description.message: Inject JavaScript and CSS from local files into websites

access_pill_ok.description: Header status pill when local files can be read.

access_pill_disabled.description: Header status pill when the browser blocks file URLs.

access_pill_helper.description: Header status pill when Kode Injector Helper is unavailable.

access_pill_permission.description: Header status pill when the native messaging permission is missing.

access_pill_checking.description: Header status pill while file access is being probed.

access_pill_title.description: Tooltip of the header file-access status pill.

theme_toggle_title.description: Tooltip of the header theme toggle button.

injections_filter_placeholder.description: Placeholder of the rule list search field.

injections_pause_all.description: Label of the global pause switch in the options toolbar.

injections_new.description: Button that opens the rule editor for a new rule.

rules_count.description: List summary with the total rule count. Plural forms separated by | starting with the zero form; %count% is a number.

rules_off_count.message: None turned off | %count% turned off | %count% turned off
rules_off_count.description: List summary suffix with the disabled rule count. Plural forms separated by | starting with the zero form; %count% is a number.

pause_strip_text.message: Paused everywhere. No code is being injected on any site.
pause_strip_text.description: Strip shown while injecting is globally paused.

pause_resume.description: Action that ends the global pause.

access_line_attention.description: Inline warning above the rule list when file access is broken.

access_review_settings.description: Link from the inline file-access warning to the Settings tab.

rules_filter_match.description: List summary while filtering. %visible% and %total% are numbers, %query% is the search text.

rule_tag_off.description: Tag shown on disabled rule rows.

rule_actions_title.description: Tooltip of the rule overflow menu button.

rule_edit.description: Menu action that opens the rule editor.

rule_duplicate.description: Menu action that duplicates a rule as a disabled copy.

rule_delete.description: Menu action that starts rule deletion.

rule_delete_question.description: Inline confirmation before deleting a rule. %host% is a hostname.

rule_delete_confirm.description: Button that permanently deletes the rule.

cancel.description: Generic action that dismisses a confirmation or dialog.

empty_title.description: Title of the zero-rules onboarding state.

empty_description.message: Map a website to local JavaScript or CSS that runs automatically on every visit.
empty_description.description: Subtitle of the zero-rules onboarding state.

empty_step_site_text.message: The hostname where your code should run, like example.com.

empty_step_files_text.message: A file:/// path to your JS, CSS, or both.

empty_step_reload_text.message: Your code is injected on every load until you turn it off.

editor_title_new.description: Rule editor title when creating a rule.

editor_title_edit.description: Rule editor title when editing a rule.

editor_site_label.description: Label of the rule editor hostname field.

editor_js_label.description: Label of the rule editor JavaScript path field.

editor_css_label.description: Label of the rule editor CSS path field.

editor_site_hint.message: The hostname to match, without https:// or path.
editor_site_hint.description: Hint below the hostname field before a valid value is entered.

editor_site_match_hint.message: Will apply on every page of %site%. Subdomains need their own rule.
editor_site_match_hint.description: Hint below the hostname field for a valid value. %site% is a hostname.

editor_site_error.message: Enter a valid hostname, like example.com.
editor_site_error.description: Validation error for an invalid hostname.

editor_file_scheme_error.message: Use a file:/// URL or an absolute file path.
editor_file_scheme_error.description: Validation error for a source path that is neither a file URL nor an absolute path.

editor_at_least_one_error.message: Add at least one file: JavaScript, CSS, or both.
editor_at_least_one_error.description: Validation error when both file paths are empty.

editor_save.description: Rule editor submit button when editing.

form_add_injection.description: Button that creates an injection rule.

settings_file_access_subtitle.message: How Kode Injector reads the file:/// paths in your rules.
settings_file_access_subtitle.description: Subtitle of the file access settings group.

tag_default.description: Tag marking the default file access method.

settings_browser_access_ok.message: Browser file access is enabled. Local files can be read.
settings_browser_access_ok.description: Status line when browser file access works.

settings_browser_access_off.message: “Allow access to file URLs” is turned off in the browser's extension settings.
settings_browser_access_off.description: Status line when the browser blocks file URLs.

settings_show_me_where.description: Expander revealing the browser settings screenshot.

settings_firefox_helper_locked.message: Firefox blocks extensions from reading file:// URLs, so Kode Injector always uses the Helper here.
settings_firefox_helper_locked.description: Explains why Firefox cannot switch the access method.

settings_language_subtitle.message: Applies to the options page and popup immediately.
settings_language_subtitle.description: Subtitle of the language settings group.

settings_appearance_title.description: Title of the appearance settings group.

settings_appearance_subtitle.description: Subtitle of the appearance settings group.

theme_system.description: Theme option following the system color scheme.

language_label.description: Label for the interface language selector.

language_browser.description: Use the browser UI language automatically.

source_code.description: Link label for the project source repository.

source_code_title.message: Report an issue or view the source code
source_code_title.description: Tooltip for the project source link.

popup_pause_all.description: Tooltip for globally pausing Kode Injector.

popup_enable_all.description: Tooltip for globally enabling Kode Injector.

popup_open_settings.description: Tooltip for opening the options page.

popup_paused_strip.description: Popup strip and status shown while globally paused.

popup_rules_caption.description: Caption above the popup matched-rules list.

popup_file_toggle_for.description: Accessible label of a popup per-file switch. %name% is the file kind and name.

popup_file_rule_off.message: Turned off with its rule in Options
popup_file_rule_off.description: Title of a per-file switch that is disabled because its rule is off.

popup_rules_active.message: No rules active on this site | %count% rule active on this site | %count% rules active on this site
popup_rules_active.description: Popup status with the active rule count. Plural forms separated by | starting with the zero form; %count% is a number.

popup_no_rules.description: Popup status when no rules match the current site.

popup_site_disabled.description: Popup status when injections are disabled for the current site.

popup_all_rules_off.description: Popup status when every matching rule is disabled.

popup_files_unreadable.description: Popup status when file access is broken.

popup_add_rule.description: Popup button that opens the options page with the site prefilled.

popup_options.description: Popup footer link to the options page.

popup_enable_file_access.description: Popup action that opens settings to fix browser file access.

popup_install_helper.description: Popup action that opens settings to install Kode Injector Helper.

popup_disable_site.description: Tooltip for disabling all injection rules on the current site.

popup_enable_site.description: Tooltip for enabling injection rules on the current site.

native_host_read_only.message: Kode Injector Helper is read-only: it cannot write files, execute programs, list directories, or access the network.
native_host_read_only.description: Explains the native helper security boundary.

native_host_status_not_installed.message: Kode Injector Helper is not installed or is not registered for this browser.

native_host_status_update_required.message: Kode Injector Helper must be updated.

native_host_status_disconnected.message: Kode Injector Helper disconnected. Check again to reconnect.

native_host_status_read_failed.message: Kode Injector Helper could not read a configured file.

native_host_check_again.description: Button rechecking the selected file access method.

popup_native_host_unavailable.message: Local file injection needs Kode Injector Helper. Open settings for installation or recovery instructions.
popup_native_host_unavailable.description: Compact popup warning when the native helper is unavailable.

popup_native_host_optional_unavailable.message: Native Host is selected, but Kode Injector Helper is unavailable. You can switch back to browser file access.
popup_native_host_optional_unavailable.description: Compact Chromium warning when the optional Native Host method is unavailable.

native_helper_download_or_update.message: Download or update Kode Injector Helper
native_helper_download_or_update.description: Action that downloads the matching Kode Injector Helper package.

helper_download.description: Button on the helper download card.

native_helper_view_all_downloads.description: Action that opens all available Kode Injector Helper downloads.

native_helper_download_unsupported.message: A download could not be selected automatically for this system. Choose one from all downloads.
native_helper_download_unsupported.description: Guidance shown when the current operating system or architecture has no direct download mapping.

native_helper_target_macos_apple_silicon.message: Kode Injector Helper for macOS (Apple silicon)
native_helper_target_macos_apple_silicon.description: Label for the Apple silicon macOS helper package.

native_helper_target_macos_intel.description: Label for the Intel macOS helper package.

native_helper_target_windows_arm64.description: Label for the ARM64 Windows helper package.

native_helper_target_windows_x86_64.description: Label for the x86-64 Windows helper package.

native_helper_target_linux_arm64.description: Label for the ARM64 Linux helper package.

native_helper_target_linux_x86_64.description: Label for the x86-64 Linux helper package.

file_access_instructions.message: Open your browser's extension settings for Kode Injector and enable Access local files on your computer or Allow access to file URLs, then check again.
file_access_instructions.description: Instructions for enabling browser permission to read local injection files.

file_access_open_extension_settings.description: Button that opens the browser-managed settings for Kode Injector.

popup_file_access_disabled.message: Local file access is disabled. Open settings for instructions.
popup_file_access_disabled.description: Compact popup warning when local injection files cannot be read.

local_source_method.description: Title of the file access settings group.

local_source_method_advanced.description: Tag marking the optional Native Host method.

local_source_method_browser.description: Option that reads local files through browser file-URL access.

local_source_method_browser_description.message: Reads local files directly through the browser and requires its file-URL access toggle to be enabled.
local_source_method_browser_description.description: Explains the browser-managed local-file access method.

local_source_method_native_host.description: Option that reads local files through the separately installed native helper.

native_host_permission_denied.message: Native Host permission was not granted. The current file access method was not changed.
native_host_permission_denied.description: Shown when a Chromium nativeMessaging permission request is declined.

local_source_method_native_host_descript.message: Reads local files through the separately installed read-only Helper. Works without the browser's “Allow access to file URLs” toggle and behaves the same in every browser.
local_source_method_native_host_descript.description: Explains that Native Host replaces browser file-URL access, its security and consistency benefits, and its installation and permission tradeoffs.

local_source_method_use_browser.description: Action that switches Chromium back to browser-managed local-file access.

local_source_method_change_failed.message: Could not change the local file access method. Try again.
local_source_method_change_failed.description: Shown when saving a local-file access method fails.

native_host_permission_required.message: Native Host is selected, but its browser permission is not enabled.
native_host_permission_required.description: Warning shown when Native Host is selected without its browser permission.

native_host_enable_permission.description: Button requesting the optional Chromium nativeMessaging permission.

editor_files_hint.message: Point at least one file — JavaScript, CSS, or both.
editor_files_hint.description: Hint above the rule editor file fields.

rules_filter_empty.description: Shown when the site filter matches nothing. %query% is the search text.

rules_filter_clear.description: Button that resets the site filter.

popup_unsupported_page.message: Kode Injector can't run on this page.
popup_unsupported_page.description: Popup state on browser-internal pages where injection is impossible.

rule_file_unreadable.description: Chip tooltip suffix when a source file cannot be read.

rule_tag_file_issue.description: Tag on rules whose source files cannot be read.

rule_open_file.description: Chip tooltip suffix; clicking opens the file in a tab.

injection_disable_for.description: Accessible label of a rule switch that is on. %host% is a hostname.

injection_enable_for.description: Accessible label of a rule switch that is off. %host% is a hostname.
